Manage users, groups, and licenses in Mi: Manage users, groups, and licenses in Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) via Microsoft Graph.
\nIf you'd like to use your own custom A:
If you'd like to use your own custom Azure app instead of the default app, follow the [Azure app creation guide](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/entra/identity-platform/quickstart-register-app#register-an-application),
 set the **Redirect URI** to {{redirectUrl}} and add the following **Microsoft Graph (Delegated) permissions** under **API permissions**:
  - User.Read.All
  - User.ReadWrite.All
  - Group.ReadWrite.All
  - Directory.Read.All
  - LicenseAssignment.ReadWrite.All
  - User.RevokeSessions.All
  - offline_access
Adds a user or group as a member of an A: Adds a user or group as a member of an Azure AD group.
Assigns or removes licenses for a user. Use addLicenses to add (include disabledPlans to disable specific service plans) and removeLicenses to remove by SkuId.
Creates a new group in Azure Active Dire: Creates a new group in Azure Active Directory.
Creates a new user in Microsoft Entra ID: Creates a new user in Microsoft Entra ID.
Deletes an Azure AD group by ID.
Deletes a user from Azure Active Directo: Deletes a user from Azure Active Directory.
Retrieves a single page of enabled users: Retrieves a single page of enabled users (accountEnabled eq true).
Retrieves an Azure AD group by its objec: Retrieves an Azure AD group by its object ID.
Gets extension and custom attributes for: Gets extension and custom attributes for an Azure AD group. Returns schema extensions and open extensions.
Retrieves an Azure AD user by object ID: Retrieves an Azure AD user by object ID or user principal name.
Lists all enabled users in the directory: Lists all enabled users in the directory, following nextLink for pagination.
Lists members of an Azure AD group.
Lists users in the directory. Supports o: Lists users in the directory. Supports optional filter and top (page size).
Clears extension/custom attributes on a: Clears extension/custom attributes on a user or group. Provide the resource type and ID, and the extension property names to clear.
Revokes all refresh tokens for the user,: Revokes all refresh tokens for the user, forcing them to sign in again.
Updates an Azure AD user. Only provide f: Updates an Azure AD user. Only provide fields you want to change.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Make a custom API call to a specific endpoint
Force Password Change on Next Sign-in: Force Password Change on Next Sign-in
Select the group. Groups are loaded from: Select the group. Groups are loaded from your Microsoft Entra ID directory.
Select the user or group to add as a mem: Select the user or group to add as a member.
Select the user. Users are loaded from y: Select the user. Users are loaded from your Microsoft Entra ID directory.
JSON array of license assignments. Examp: JSON array of license assignments. Example: [{"skuId":"sku-guid"}] or [{"skuId":"sku-guid","disabledPlans":["plan-guid-1"]}] to disable specific plans.
JSON array of SKU IDs (strings) to remov: JSON array of SKU IDs (strings) to remove. Example: ["sku-guid-1","sku-guid-2"]
The display name of the group.
Mail alias (e.g. \"team-alpha\"). Used f: Mail alias (e.g. "team-alpha"). Used for mail-enabled groups; must be unique.
Set to true for a mail-enabled security: Set to true for a mail-enabled security or Microsoft 365 group.
Set to true for a security group.
The name displayed in the address book f: The name displayed in the address book for the user.
The mail alias for the user (local part,: The mail alias for the user (local part, no @domain).
Initial password for the user. Must sati: Initial password for the user. Must satisfy your tenant password policy.
If enabled, the user must change their p: If enabled, the user must change their password at first sign-in.
Whether the user can sign in.
Two-letter ISO 3166 country code (e.g. \: Two-letter ISO 3166 country code (e.g. "US"). Required before assigning licenses.
Maximum number of users to return (1–999: Maximum number of users to return (1–999). Default 100.
Number of users per page (1–999). Defaul: Number of users per page (1–999). Default 100.
Maximum number of members to return (1–9: Maximum number of members to return (1–999). Default 100.
Select the user or group to clear extens: Select the user or group to clear extension attributes from.
Comma-separated extension property names: Comma-separated extension property names to clear (e.g. extension_xxx_AttributeName). Leave empty to clear known extension keys.
Authorization headers are injected autom: Authorization headers are injected automatically from your connection.
Enable for files like PDFs, images, etc.
HEAD: HEAD
Triggers when a user is deleted from Mic: Triggers when a user is deleted from Microsoft Entra ID.
Triggers when a new group is created in: Triggers when a new group is created in Microsoft Entra ID.
Triggers when a new user is created in M: Triggers when a new user is created in Microsoft Entra ID.
